_comment: Machine-readable companion to PATHS.md. Phase B (path-canonicalization and reference-hardening), 2026-07-16. If this file and PATHS.md ever disagree, PATHS.md is authoritative -- update this file to match, not the reverse.

runtimeCriticalAssets.failureBehavior: degrades gracefully with a load warning if missing
degrades gracefully with a load warning if missing
degrades gracefully with a load warning if missing

runtimeCriticalAssets.note: filenames/count only, file contents are never opened
filenames/count only, file contents are never opened
filenames only, used to build schemaRefs metadata strings

deprecatedRoots.reason: exact self-nested duplicate of the entire canonical package tree
deprecatedRoots.status: prohibited - not canonical, not safe to delete yet
deprecatedRoots.divergenceReason: Phase A added historical/path-correction notices to the canonical copies only, by design
deprecatedRoots.evidence: 2026-07-16 Phase B reference audit: zero functional (runtime/build/test) references found anywhere in the repository outside the duplicate tree itself; only this package's own README.md and docs/DOC_OWNERSHIP.yml mention it, both descriptively
removalPrerequisites: fresh full re-hash of all tracked files

deprecatedRoots.reason: near-duplicate of exports/ caused by invoking pipelines/master_pipeline.py or pipelines/export/sync_manager.py with cwd set to pipelines/ instead of the package root
deprecatedRoots.status: stale generated output, zero confirmed consumers
deprecatedRoots.evidence: 2026-07-16 audit: pipelines/exports/json/costbook.json has 1795 items / 39 assemblies vs. the canonical exports/json/costbook.json's 1795 items / 289 assemblies; no CI, app, or doc reference found anywhere except this package's own README describing the problem
removalPrerequisites: confirm no external/manual consumer per README known-risks section

deprecatedRoots.reason: byte-identical to pipelines/exports/json/costbook.json; same root cause and same wrong-cwd run
deprecatedRoots.status: stale generated output, zero confirmed consumers

compatibilityFallback.evidence: 2026-07-16 Phase B reference audit found zero tracked in-repo consumers (runtime, build, or test) referencing the doubled packages/knowledge-engine/knowledge-engine path in any executable form -- only documentation describing the problem. app/modules/trainingless-estimate-demo/knowledgeLoader.ts is cwd-fragile but structurally cannot resolve into the doubled path given its hardcoded path segments, so it does not qualify as a doubled-path consumer either.

unresolvedRisks.description: packages/knowledge-engine/scripts/assembly_pipeline_common.py's KNOWLEDGE_DIR constant resolves to the shallow knowledge/ path, which does not contain assemblies/ or trade-progress.json in the current tree; the canonical data lives one level deeper at knowledge/knowledge/. This makes audit-assemblies.py and its dependents silently report zero existing assemblies for every trade.
unresolvedRisks.whyNotFixedInPhaseB: Fixing this changes observable script output/business behavior (from reporting zero assemblies to reporting real counts), which Phase B's stop conditions reserve for explicit founder review rather than an in-flight path-canonicalization pass.
unresolvedRisks.status: documented, not fixed - founder decision required

unresolvedRisks.description: approve-assembly-batch.py and validate_batch.py disagree with each other on the location of Data/working/costbook_pending.json (package-root-anchored vs. cwd-relative), and neither location currently exists on disk.
unresolvedRisks.status: documented, not fixed - founder decision required

unresolvedRisks.description: The task-queue/batch-runner family and the orchestrator script still use bare cwd-relative runtime/*.json paths with no marker validation. None of them write to exports/** or cause the specific duplicate-output defect Phase B was scoped to fix, so hardening all of them was judged out of scope for this narrow pass.
unresolvedRisks.status: documented, not fixed - candidate for a future phase

unresolvedRisks.description: app/modules/trainingless-estimate-demo/knowledgeLoader.ts is cwd-relative with no dual-marker guard. Confirmed it cannot currently resolve into the duplicate tree (its hardcoded segments don't match that shape), so it is fragile (crashes on wrong cwd) rather than dangerous (silently wrong). No proven doubled-path reference exists to justify an app/** change in this phase.
unresolvedRisks.status: documented, not fixed - recommended hardening for a future phase
